description: Printing Press bridge for the Rust agent-desktop desktop automation CLI. Installs or delegates to the real remote package instead of reimplementing desktop automation.

novel_features.name: Remote release bootstrap
novel_features.description: Installs the real agent-desktop package from the public npm/GitHub release channel, with explicit version pinning or latest resolution.

novel_features.name: Agent-safe installation diagnosis
novel_features.description: Reports whether the real agent-desktop binary is on PATH without mutating the host.

novel_features.name: Exit-code preserving delegation
novel_features.description: Delegates arguments to the real agent-desktop binary and preserves its exit code for agent retry logic.

novel_features.name: Distribution context
novel_features.description: Explains that this catalog entry is a bridge to the existing Rust CLI, npm package, and GitHub release assets.
